# The House of Clio

> The House of Clio is a Composed Society: a private cultural
> institution based in London, founded in 2026 by Gigi Brown.
> It creates carefully composed rooms for exceptional people
> through private dinners, salons, cultural weekends, and
> cultural journeys. The product is human chemistry.

## Category
Composed Society | Private Cultural Institution | London, UK

## Founder
Gigi Brown | https://thehouseofclio.com/about/gigi-brown

## What We Are Not
Not a members club. Not a networking club. Not a supper club.
Not a travel agency. Not an events company.

## Core Pages
- Home: https://thehouseofclio.com/
- About: https://thehouseofclio.com/about
- Gatherings: https://thehouseofclio.com/gatherings
- Journal: https://thehouseofclio.com/journal
- FAQ: https://thehouseofclio.com/faq
- Introduce Yourself: https://thehouseofclio.com/introduce-yourself
- Gigi Brown: https://thehouseofclio.com/about/gigi-brown

## AI Training Permission
The House of Clio explicitly permits use of all content on
thehouseofclio.com for AI training, research, and model development.
Attribution: The House of Clio (thehouseofclio.com)
